description_long: This object is an abstract, highly stylized representation of an adult pedestrian, composed of sharp, angular planes and elongated, intersecting spikes. The form is fragmented, with several jagged elements extending outward, giving it a dynamic, almost chaotic appearance. The main body mass is low and wide, with some blue-tinted sections suggesting clothing or accessories, while the rest is predominantly black with metallic reflections. There are no discernible facial features, limbs, or anatomical details, making the figure appear more like a modern art sculpture than a realistic human. The structure is mostly hollow, with thin surfaces and open spaces between the angular components. The overall impression is of a futuristic, deconstructed human form, possibly intended as an artistic installation or conceptual figure.
description: A highly abstract, angular sculpture of an adult pedestrian with sharp, intersecting planes and a fragmented, dynamic form.
description_view_0: From this view, the object displays a cluster of sharp, black and blue angular planes with several thin spikes extending upward and outward.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the elongated, flat black surfaces and the prominent blue triangular section, with spikes projecting to the right.
description_view_2: Here, the object appears lower and more spread out, with the central spike and two side elements visible, emphasizing its fragmented structure.
description_view_3: This view shows the intersecting spikes and angular planes from above, with the black surfaces dominating and blue accents visible at the base.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract angular forms suggesting stylized outerwear or a futuristic suit
attribute_posture: dynamic, fragmented stance with angular extensions
attribute_footwear_type: indistinct, abstract base with no clear footwear
attribute_hairstyle: indistinct, no clear hairstyle due to abstract form
